description: VisageCloud is a face search, recognition, and classification service. Its published API description covers image analysis, streams, collections, profiles, classifiers, and account/billing operations.
summary: VisageCloud exposes a REST API documented at /v2/api-docs; the published Swagger describes query-parameter authentication using an access key plus secret/read-only key, and an account login endpoint that exchanges email/password for those keys. No public GraphQL API, MCP server, or CLI surface was found.
